ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ESPINO, LAURA HEARING SET FOR DEC-11-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PETITIONER ESPINO, LAURA
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF PETITION OF CHANGE OF NAME IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER ESPINO, LAURA HEARING SET FOR OCT-31-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

UNCONTESTED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF DEC-11-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 218 IS OFF CALENDAR - PETITIONER'S FEE WAIVER WAS DENIED. PETITIONER DID NOT PAY THE FEE AND MUST SUBMIT PROOF OF PUBLICATION. JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK: CARLA AMADOR & SAJJA RAVINANTAPRICHA , CSR: NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 218)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER LAURA ESPINO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. LAURA ESPINO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: EBURA/DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
